pages.raw_text:
Lese majestic Is the horrible crime
with which Miles o. Byrne. socialist
speaker, was arraigned before Judge
Hinkle in police court this afternoon.
The crime consisted of scathing re-
marks about Mayor l.. Frank Boyd
and his administration.


Byrne secured permit from the
mayor to talk on socialism at Main
avenue and Stevens street. Then
Byrne showed his awful ingratitude
by attacking the mayor and other city
officials.


Mayor Boyd heard of the horrible
roasts and ordered the permit to
speak cancelled When this was done
Byrne continued to make remarks
about the mayors lock of municipal
regularity.


Mayor Boyd called In his advisers
and determined that Byrne was guilty
of lese majestic. officer Tom Lister
was sent out to arrest Byrne for
roasting the mayor.


Byrne was locked up In the city jail
and the requests of his friends for
release were turned down.


Today he pleaded not guilty and the
case Will be tried tomorrow after
noon.
